title: Origin Asset
description: A machine-readable registration record for an origin structure asset in the Origin Structure Market.

id.description: A unique identifier for the registered origin asset.

title.description: Human-readable title of the origin asset.

creator.description: Identifier, handle, name, or DID of the origin creator.

asset_type.description: Category of the registered origin asset.

description.description: Short explanation of the registered structure and its intended use.

canonical_hash.description: Hash of the canonical expression of the origin asset.

timestamp.description: Registration timestamp of the origin asset.

version.description: Version of this origin asset record.

jurisdiction.description: Optional jurisdiction or legal context for interpretation.

license.description: Optional license information for the origin asset.

permission.description: Permission layer defining allowed use of the origin asset.

attribution_required.description: Whether attribution to the origin creator is required.

ai_training_allowed.description: Whether the asset may be used for AI training.

ai_inference_allowed.description: Whether the asset may be used during AI inference or agent workflows.

redistribution_allowed.description: Whether redistribution of the asset is allowed.

royalty_policy.description: Default royalty policy for revenue generated by derivatives or commercial use.

default_rate.description: Default royalty rate allocated to the origin creator.

derivative_rate.description: Suggested rate allocated when the asset is used as an upstream origin in derivatives.

audit_rate.description: Suggested rate allocated to origin auditors or evaluators.

protocol_fund_rate.description: Suggested rate allocated to protocol maintenance or commons funding.

currency.description: Preferred currency for off-chain royalty settlement.

trace.description: Trace links and related assets that support the origin claim.

source_url.description: Primary URL or repository location of the canonical origin asset.

gpt_url.description: Optional GPT or agent URL related to the asset.

related_assets.description: Related origin assets, protocols, repositories, or standards.

evidence_hashes.description: Additional hashes for supporting evidence, drafts, commits, or archived records.
